name: Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except cinnamon in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
2. Mix thoroughly.
3. Place the casserole in a pan filled with hot water, approximately 1 inch deep.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 55 to 65 minutes (or until a knife inserted halfway comes out clean).
5. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
6. Serve warm or cold. Raisins can be added initially.
